action.description: QC decision: pass=approve all as-is, filter=remove some rows, retrigger_discovery=need more rows, restructure=0 rows need table redesign

oneOf.description: Ordered list of row_ids to KEEP. First = first row in output. Rows NOT in this list are removed.

keep_row_ids_in_order.description: Which rows to keep AND their order. If provided, only these rows are kept in this exact order. If null, all rows kept in original order. Use for filtering AND/OR reordering.

oneOf.description: Map of row_id -> reason for removal. Only for rows NOT in keep_row_ids_in_order.

removal_reasons.description: Optional: brief reasons why specific rows were removed (for logging). Example: {"3-FakeCompany": "Not a real company"}

overall_score.description: Overall quality score for the set (0-1). Null only for restructure action.

discovery_guidance.description: What discovery needs to find (focus on MORE ROWS, not filling columns). Required for retrigger_discovery action.

new_subdomains.description: New search subdomains to find more entities. Required for retrigger_discovery action.

restructuring_guidance.description: How to restructure the table. Required for restructure action.

user_message.description: User-facing message explaining the restructure. Required for restructure action.
